title: UDP Sounds
description: A simple mod that introduces blocks that can be activated with redstone or clicked to play station noises.
body:
# What is UDP Sound Bytes?
This mod introduces a new type of block, Speakers!
Speaker blocks can be activated with redstone or clicked on to play sounds. 
Currently adds Speaker blocks that play track scraping, train horns, station announcements, train ambience, track crossing, and Japan train station leaving tunes.
These can be used for stations(station ambience, passing trains, etc).
More sounds are on their way! :)
Make sure to check out my other mods!
Thanks!
